Sleep Cycle Calculator

Calculate optimal wake-up times based on 90-minute sleep cycles. Waking between cycles helps you feel more refreshed.

FAQ

How long is one sleep cycle?

One complete sleep cycle lasts approximately 90 minutes and includes light sleep, deep sleep, and REM stages.

How many sleep cycles do I need?

Most adults need 5-6 complete cycles (7.5-9 hours) per night for optimal health and cognitive function.

Why do I feel tired after 8 hours of sleep?

You may be waking in the middle of a deep sleep phase. Try adjusting your wake time by 15-30 minutes to align with cycle completion.
